description: A wind turbine blade designer needs to modify a NACA 4415 airfoil (4% max camber at 40% chord, 15% thickness) to have a blunt trailing edge for manufacturing feasibility. Generate the NACA 4415 airfoil and apply a trailing edge gap of 2.0% of chord with a blending distance of 80% of chord from the trailing edge. Export the modified airfoil coordinates in standard .dat format (header line followed by x,y coordinate pairs) to /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/naca4415_bluntTE.dat.
